_comment: Primary application settings. Values here are loaded first, then overridden by platformSettings.json and aiSettings.json when same keys exist.

DecisionEngine._comment: Core decision worker behavior: symbols, quantity, cycle timing, quality gates, and idempotency/cooldown safety.
DecisionEngine._comment_Symbol: Fallback single symbol used only when 'Symbols' list is empty or missing.
DecisionEngine._comment_Symbols: Primary list of symbols the decision worker loops through each cycle.
DecisionEngine._comment_Quantity: Base order quantity used when creating trade candidates/orders for each symbol.
DecisionEngine._comment_IntervalSeconds: How often the decision worker executes one full decision cycle.
DecisionEngine._comment_MinConfidence: Minimum decision confidence (0..1). Trades below this are skipped.
DecisionEngine._comment_MinConfidenceThreshold: Legacy key kept for backward compatibility; MinConfidence is preferred.
DecisionEngine._comment_TradeCooldownSeconds: Legacy cooldown key; 'Trading:CooldownSeconds' currently has higher priority.
DecisionEngine._comment_IdempotencyWindowSeconds: Time window used to block duplicate executions for same computed decision id.

MovingAverageCrossoverStrategy._comment: Strategy parameters used by MovingAverageCrossoverStrategy for signal generation quality.
MovingAverageCrossoverStrategy._comment_ShortPeriod: Number of recent candles used for short moving average.
MovingAverageCrossoverStrategy._comment_LongPeriod: Number of candles used for long moving average (must be > ShortPeriod).
MovingAverageCrossoverStrategy._comment_TrendStrengthThreshold: Minimum normalized MA distance/trend metric required to allow BUY/SELL (e.g. 0.001 = 0.1%).
MovingAverageCrossoverStrategy._comment_VolatilityThreshold: Minimum volatility ratio over long window (max-min)/longMA required to avoid flat-market trades.
MovingAverageCrossoverStrategy._comment_CooldownSeconds: Strategy-internal signal cooldown per symbol to avoid rapid repeated signals.

ExecutionSettings._comment: Order execution safety switch and retry behavior for transient exchange/network failures.
ExecutionSettings._comment_Enabled: Master kill-switch. False = decision only (no real order placement).
ExecutionSettings._comment_UseMarketOrders: Current execution service supports market orders path; false will skip execution.

Retry._comment: TradeExecutionService retry policy (attempts after first try, exponential backoff base delay in milliseconds).
Retry._comment_Count: How many retries after the first failed attempt (2 means up to 3 total attempts) start counts from 0.
Retry._comment_BaseDelayMs: Initial backoff delay in milliseconds; each retry doubles this delay.

Trading._comment: Trading execution controls used by DecisionWorker.
Trading._comment_CooldownSeconds: Global cooldown after successful trade per symbol; blocks new trades during this period.

TradeMonitoring._comment: Open-position monitoring loop. Used by TradeMonitorWorker.
TradeMonitoring._comment_IntervalSeconds: How frequently open positions are checked for exit conditions.
TradeMonitoring._comment_MaxTradeDurationMinutes: Force-close position when its lifetime exceeds this duration.
TradeMonitoring._comment_DefaultStopLossPercent: Default stop-loss percent from entry when explicit SL is not set elsewhere.
TradeMonitoring._comment_DefaultTakeProfitPercent: Default take-profit percent from entry when explicit TP is not set elsewhere.

TradeAnalytics._comment_Enabled: If false, AnalyticsWorker exits immediately and does not run.
TradeAnalytics._comment_IntervalMinutes: How often analytics summary is computed and logged.

RiskSettings._comment: Risk controls used before/around execution: exposure limits, size limits, balance checks, and protective SL/TP defaults.
RiskSettings._comment_MaxPositionQuote: Maximum allowed quote-value (e.g. USDT) of resulting position for a symbol.
RiskSettings._comment_MaxOrderQuote: Maximum quote-value allowed for a single order request.
RiskSettings._comment_MaxExposurePercent: Maximum percentage of quote equity that one symbol exposure can represent.
RiskSettings._comment_MaxPositionSize: Maximum base-asset quantity allowed per symbol after applying a trade.
RiskSettings._comment_MaxLeverage: Simulated leverage cap (spot safety). Exposure must stay <= quoteEquity * MaxLeverage.
RiskSettings._comment_QuoteAsset: Quote currency used for valuation and balance checks (usually USDT).
RiskSettings._comment_DefaultStopLossPercent: SL percentage used by risk service to calculate StopLossPrice for approved trade.
RiskSettings._comment_DefaultTakeProfitPercent: TP percentage used by risk service to calculate TakeProfitPrice for approved trade.

BinanceRateLimit._comment: Client-side request pacing limit for Binance calls.
BinanceRateLimit._comment_MaxRequestsPerSecond: Max outbound Binance requests per second allowed by local rate limiter.

Workers._comment: Example worker tuning block for future use; currently most worker intervals are hardcoded in worker classes unless explicitly wired.

MarketData._comment_IntervalSeconds: Example only: intended fetch interval for market data caching loop.

OrderSync._comment_IntervalSeconds: Example only: intended interval for syncing open orders from exchange.

TradeSync._comment_IntervalSeconds: Example only: intended interval for syncing fills/trades into local DB.
TradeSync._comment_BatchSize: Example only: how many orders to process per sync batch.
TradeSync._comment_MaxSyncRetryCount: Example only: max retries before giving up on failed trade sync item.

Position._comment_IntervalSeconds: Example only: intended interval for position reconciliation/updating.
Position._comment_BatchSize: Example only: max orders/positions processed per cycle.

BalanceSync._comment_IntervalSeconds: Example only: intended interval for account balance snapshots.

TimeSync._comment_IntervalSeconds: Example only: intended interval for exchange time offset refresh.
